message:
build(deps): bump toml 0.8→1.0; Duration::from_mins in recovery test

- Cargo.toml: bump toml from 0.8 to 1.0 in both [dependencies] and
  [dev-dependencies] — 1.0 stabilizes the API with no breaking changes
  for our usage (serde round-trip of config files)

- distributed/recovery.rs: test assertion from_secs(60) → from_mins(1)
  to match the default already changed in the implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
